zh.lifeSummary: 當Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar於1243年3月出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親Sir William De Mar V Earl21歲，母親Elizabeth Comyn20歲。他於1266年與Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1296年登記服兵役。他去世於1297年7月25日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波藍德阿比托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar于1243年3月出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，他的父亲Sir William De Mar V Earl21岁，母亲Elizabeth Comyn20岁。他于1266年与Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1296年登记服兵役。他去世于1297年7月25日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波藍德阿比托。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Uillem
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of   Gilliam   and   Gwilliam  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilliam
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Gill(i)am, Gillem, Old French Guillaume, a Parisian form of Will(i)am (see William ).

nameMeanings.name: Domhnall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: from Old Celtic dubno ‘world’ + val ‘rule’. See also Donald .

en.lifeSummary: When Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar was born in March 1243, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William De Mar V Earl, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Comyn, was 20. He married Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' in 1266, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1296. He died on 25 July 1297, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 54, and was buried in Abbeytown, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar est né en mars 1243, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William De Mar V Earl, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Comyn, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' en 1266, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1296. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1297, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Abbeytown, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar im März 1243 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William De Mar V Earl 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Comyn 20. Er hat 1266 in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1296 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 25. Juli 1297 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Abbeytown, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar è nato il nel marzo 1243 nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William De Mar V Earl, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Comyn, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' nel 1266, nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1296. Morì il 25 luglio 1297, nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbeytown, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Marが1243年3月にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William De Mar V Earlは21歳，母Elizabeth Comynは20歳であった。1266年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーでElen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1296年に兵役登録をした。彼は1297年7月25日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドアベイトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar(이)가 1243년 3월 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William De Mar V Earl(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Comyn(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1266년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1297년 7월 25일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 애브브이타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar nasceu em março de 1243, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William De Mar V Earl, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Comyn, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' em 1266, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1296. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1297, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbeytown, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar родился марта 1243 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William De Mar V Earl было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Comyn, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' в 1266 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1296 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 25 июля 1297 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности эббитоун, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar nació en marzo de 1243, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William De Mar V Earl, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Comyn, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' en 1266, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1296. Murió el 25 de julio de 1297, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Abbeytown, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
